title: Master_Recycling_Guide_Part_3_Plastics
text:
### Can I recycle a shampoo bottle?

Usually yes.

### Can I recycle a disposable coffee lid?

Depends on the material and local program.

### Can I recycle a plastic straw?

Usually no.

### Can I recycle Styrofoam?

Most curbside programs do not accept it.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Common Mistakes

Avoid placing these in recycling:

-   Garden hoses
-   Pool toys
-   Inflatable items
-   Plastic hangers
-   Vinyl flooring
-   Shower curtains
-   Plastic rope
-   Extension cords

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Search Synonyms

Users may search for:

-   Pop bottle
-   Soda bottle
-   Water bottle
-   Juice bottle
-   Milk jug
-   Yogurt cup
-   Yogurt tub
-   Plastic container
-   Food tub
-   Clamshell
-   Berry box
-   Plastic wrap
-   Saran wrap
-   Stretch wrap
-   Bread bag
-   Grocery bag
-   Chip packet
-   Snack wrapper
-   Foam cup
-   Styrofoam cup

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Best Practices

-   Empty containers.
-   Rinse away food.
-   Do not bag recyclables.
-   Keep plastic film out of curbside recycling.
-   Check local rules for plastics #3--#7.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# References

-   U.S. EPA Recycling: https://www.epa.gov/recycle
-   CalRecycle: https://calrecycle.ca.gov/
-   Earth911 Recycling Search: https://search.earth911.com/
